Household spending module microdata (userid, wave date, reported and expected spending changes, windfall allocation questions), chart data, questionnaire, glossary, and the January 2023 series note. Fielded every four months to core SCE panelists; public microdata released with an eighteen-month lag.
source: Federal Reserve Bank of New York, SCE Household Spending Survey
